ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of the school (e.g., Elementary, Secondary, Combined) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the school */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students currently enrolled */,
  "staff_count" INTEGER /* Number of staff members */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or district the school belongs to */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last health inspection */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the last health inspection (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_status_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the school (e.g., Open, Closed, Partial Closure) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status change */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_status_logs_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_status_logs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school where the case was reported */,
  "case_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of case (e.g., Student, Staff) */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Date the case was confirmed */,
  "case_status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the case (e.g., Active, Resolved) */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Person who reported the case */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the case was reported */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the affected individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the affected individual */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms reported (e.g., fever, cough) */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the individual was diagnosed */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date the individual recovered (if applicable) */,
  "isolation_location" TEXT /* Location where the individual is isolated (e.g., home, hospital) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_case_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_type_id") REFERENCES case_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_case_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_status_id") REFERENCES case_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the student attends */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the student */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class the student is in */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the student */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the student's parent or guardian */,
  "parent_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the student's parent or guardian */,
  "parent_contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the student's parent or guardian */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any known medical conditions (e.g., asthma, diabetes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the staff member works at */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the staff member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff member belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the staff member */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the staff member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the staff member */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any known medical conditions (e.g., asthma, diabetes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "contact_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of contact (e.g., Student, Staff) */,
  "contact_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact entity (student or staff) */,
  "contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the contact */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last known contact */,
  "quarantine_status" TEXT /* Status of the contact's quarantine (e.g., Quarantining, Not Quarantining) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_contacts_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_contacts_contact_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_type_id") REFERENCES case_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health alert */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of health alert (e.g., New Case, School Closure) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the health alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the health alert was issued */,
  "alert_status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the health alert (e.g., Active, Sent, Resolved) */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "alert_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert expires or is no longer active */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_alerts_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_alerts_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_alerts_alert_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_status_id") REFERENCES alert_statuses ("alert_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_alerts_alert_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_type_id") REFERENCES alert_types ("alert_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "status_change_date" TEXT /* Date the status changed */,
  "previous_status_id" INTEGER /* Previous status of the case */,
  "new_status_id" INTEGER /* New status of the case */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the case status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_history_new_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_status_id") REFERENCES case_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_history_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_history_previous_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_status_id") REFERENCES case_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., Login, Report Generation) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Case Summary, School Status) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., Read, Write, Admin) */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the permission (e.g., School, District, Region) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing a list of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the case type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the case type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the case status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the case status is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_types" (
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert type */,
  "alert_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_statuses" (
  "alert_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert status */,
  "alert_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert status is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_status_id")
)
